intro: 🔗 Facebook Ads URL Parser is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for advertising intelligence. Copy any Facebook Ad Library URL and get instant ad data - No configuration needed. This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: the Actor parses the provided Facebook Ad Library URL
it then executes [Facebook Ads Scraper Pro](https://apify.com/dzomar/facebook-ads-scraper-pro?fpr=smcx63) in standby mode
the scraper performs the actual data extraction and returns results to this Actor
you may see two Actors running for a single execution

faq.q: How do I run 🔗 Facebook Ads URL Parser?
faq.a: Open 🔗 Facebook Ads URL Parser on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.

faq.q: Is 🔗 Facebook Ads URL Parser free?
faq.a: 🔗 Facebook Ads URL Parser runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
